from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class UserRecord:
    name: str
    email: str
    age: int
    role: str


def build_user_index(users: list[dict]) -> dict[str, UserRecord]:
    index = {}
    for user in users:
        index[user["id"]] = UserRecord(
            name=user["name"],
            email=user["email"],
            age=user["age"],
            role=user["role"],
        )
    return index


def lookup_users(user_ids: list[str], user_index: dict[str, UserRecord]) -> list:
    results = []
    for uid in user_ids:
        if uid in user_index:
            record = user_index[uid]
            results.append({"name": record.name, "email": record.email})
    return results


def merge_user_data(
    users_a: dict[str, UserRecord], users_b: dict[str, UserRecord]
) -> dict[str, UserRecord]:
    merged = {}
    for uid in set(users_a) | set(users_b):
        a = users_a.get(uid)
        b = users_b.get(uid)
        merged[uid] = UserRecord(
            name=a.name if a else b.name,
            email=a.email if a else b.email,
            age=a.age if a else b.age,
            role=a.role if a else b.role,
        )
    return merged
